_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
source_files: Acute febrile illness, Enteric fever, Pyrexia of unknown origin _Medco.pdf
Acute febrile illness, Enteric fever, Pyrexia of unknown origin _PPD.CPD.pdf
clinical_indications: Fever >= 38.3'C or >=101'F for more than 2 days
Headache, Dizziness, Pain in Muscles and Joints, Weakness
Patients presenting with AFI should be assessed for organ dysfunction at presentation and symptoms/signs suggestive of sepsis should be ruled out as management protocol will differ.

preauth.label: CBC, ESR, Peripheral smear, LFT report

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers, Treatment details
Post treatment CBC, ESR, Peripheral smear, LFT reports

ppd_preauth.q: Did the patient suffer from fever >= 38.3'C or >=101'F for more than 2 days?

common_queries: Patient did not suffer from fever >= 38.3'C (or >=101'F) for more than 2 days.
